subcodes.first_line: One day in Baghdad, very early in the morning, Mullá Baqir, one of the Letters of the Living, attained the presence of Bahá’u’lláh. He asked him, “What were you doing last evening?” “I was reading the Ahsanu’l-Qisas,” he replied
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @Letters of the Living
